channel.title: Dimension 20 Live
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Live on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Quangle Quest
item.description:
Live from Seattle's Climate Pledge Arena, the Intrepid Heroes assemble to rescue one of their own from quantum quanglement.

Duration: 2:47:57

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Time Quangle, tabletop rpg, dungeons and dragons, multiverse, time travel, space, magic, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Quangle Quest Trailer
item.description:
It’s time to quangle like you’ve never quangled before. New special premieres December 10th.

Duration: 01:06

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Time Quangle, tabletop rpg, dungeons and dragons, multiverse, time travel, space, magic, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: 2025 Battle at the Bowl
item.description:
The Bad Kids battle their greatest enemy in a fatal face off... it's the Rumble in the Chungle!

Duration: 1:56:49

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Fantasy High, dungeons and dragons, fantasy, magic, wizards, high school, heroes, supernatural, tabletop rpg, pirates, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
